title: Summer Entertaining: 15 Must-Have Gadgets
meta_description: 15 essential summer entertaining gadgets for pool parties, BBQs, and more. Must-have tools for drinks, cooking, and fun!
html:
Summer is all about gatherings—poolside sips, backyard BBQs, and spontaneous get-togethers. To make your hosting game strong, we rounded up 15 gadgets that simplify summer entertaining ideas, from drinks to dessert. Whether you’re scaling up snacks or adding a playful twist, these tools will save you time and impress your guests.

Creative Summer Entertaining Ideas for Drinks

Drafting a drink menu? Small details make a big impact. The 150-Pack Cocktail Drink Umbrellas & Picks are perfect for tropical vibes—use them as parasols for piña coladas or as skewers for fresh fruit garnishes. Pair them with the 100-Pack Umbrella Straws for a cohesive look in margaritas or tropical mocktails. Both sets come in festive styles that double as conversation starters.

Pro tip: Keep extra umbrella picks on hand for appetizers like shrimp or fruit kebabs. They’re tiny, versatile, and dishwasher-safe for easy cleanup.

Summer Entertaining Essentials for BBQs and Sides

Barbecue season calls for tools that handle messes with ease. The Interlocking Corn on the Cob Holders keep sticky fingers at bay while letting guests eat mess-free. Their silicone handles are heat-resistant, so they work on the grill or at the table. For veggie prep, the Onion Holder & Slicing Guide ensures even dice for salsa or potato salad. It also doubles as a meat tenderizer—bonus for grill masters.

If you’re serving homemade bread with a summer picnic, the 3-in-1 Sourdough Whisk Set streamlines mixing, scraping, and scoring dough. Pair it with the Wooden Spurtle & Sourdough Starter Stirrer Set for a beginner-friendly way to maintain your starter between events.

Fun and Functional Tools for the Table

Entertaining should be fun, and the Extendable Prank Fork adds a laugh to dinner. Stretch it to 25.4 inches to tease friends or retrieve dishes from the buffet. It’s a gag gift that’s actually useful for large families or festive occasions.

For a main dish, the Vertical Gyro Pan with Skewer lets you roast al pastor or shawarma in the oven. It’s a crowd-pleaser for summer potlucks, especially when paired with flatbreads and fresh salsa.

Stylish Storage for Year-Round Use

Organization matters, even in the chaos of hosting. The interlocking corn holders stack neatly for storage, and the wooden spurtle fits in a drawer without taking space. Keep your summer entertaining ideas rotating by stowing seasonal gadgets in labeled bins—this way, you’ll always find what you need when summer rolls around again.

FAQ

What are must-have summer entertaining gadgets?

Focus on tools that streamline drinks (umbrella picks, straws), simplify cooking (onion holders, vertical gyro pan), and add fun (prank fork). The key is balancing utility with whimsy.

How to use cocktail umbrella picks beyond drinks?

They’re great for skewering fruit for charcuterie boards, holding herbs in DIY drink garnishes, or even as decorative accents in floral arrangements.

Can these tools work for non-summer events?

Absolutely! The sourdough tools are perfect for fall baking, while the prank fork works at any holiday dinner. Most are durable enough for year-round use.
